chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1699 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 14-05-2025 Mr. Shah Muhammd Panhwar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that the petitioner would avail alternate remedy by approaching the proper forum for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
